results.title: Talisker 1988, The Distillers Edition 2001 Bottling
results.description: This rare single malt from the Isle of Skye legend, Talisker, was distilled in 1988 and bottled specially for The Distillers Edition series in 2001.

results.title: Talisker 2001 Distillers Edition
results.description: Double matured Amoroso sherry casks. Talisker. Talisker Distillery was established at Carbost on the Isle of Skye off the west coast of Scotland in 1830.

results.title: Talisker Distiller's Edition 10 Years Double-Matured
results.description: The oldest Single Malt Scotch Whisky made by the sea on the shores of the Isle of Skye, one of the most remote, rugged, yet beautiful landscapes in Scotland.
